title: scenario-author eval rubric
description: Three boolean gates per row, scored from the committed golden snapshot. Byte-stability across --concurrency 1 vs 8 is verified separately as a P9 quality-gate (mix corpus.validate), NOT here.

slug.description: Slug used across priv/zenrule, corpus/zen_rules, and evals/golden

rule_compiles.description: golden/<slug>/rule.json exists and parses to the canonical 3-node JDM graph

human_edits_needed.description: true when the skill output required hand-editing before the proof went green (sidecar .human_edits_needed flag in the golden dir)

notes.description: Free-form notes from the runner (which gate failed and why)
